## Problem

A clear description of the problem this feature would solve.

## Proposed Solution

A clear description of what you'd like to see.

## Alternatives Considered

Any alternative solutions or workarounds you've tried.

## Use Case

Describe how this feature would be used in practice. Who benefits?

## Additional Context

Add any other context, references, or examples here.
